'''âng-dh-z-d''' ('''kangadhzedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:woodshed|woodshed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-dh-z-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:woodshed|woodshed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âng-dh-z-d
|-
! Lemma
| kangadhzedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingadhzedoko|thingadhzedoko]] || [[word:jingadhzedoko|jingadhzedoko]] || [[word:shingadhzedoko|shingadhzedoko]] || [[word:kingadhzedoko|kingadhzedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungadhzedoko|thuthungadhzedoko]] || [[word:jujungadhzedoko|jujungadhzedoko]] || [[word:shushungadhzedoko|shushungadhzedoko]] || [[word:kukungadhzedoko|kukungadhzedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongadhzedoko|thongadhzedoko]] || [[word:jongadhzedoko|jongadhzedoko]] || [[word:shongadhzedoko|shongadhzedoko]] || [[word:kongadhzedoko|kongadhzedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠngadhzedoko|thĂŠngadhzedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠngadhzedoko|jĂŠngadhzedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠngadhzedoko|shĂŠngadhzedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠngadhzedoko|kĂŠngadhzedoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangadhzedoko|thangadhzedoko]] || [[word:jangadhzedoko|jangadhzedoko]] || [[word:shangadhzedoko|shangadhzedoko]] || [[word:kangadhzedoko|kangadhzedoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
